backend/main.mo: Motoko actor with a single public function `deduplicateComicText` that filters duplicate text lines from an input array using a Set, trapping on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the restoration of comic panels to frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts with high confidence, linked to test REQ-1 and multiple components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files covering styling, hooks, contexts, components, and data models for a Spider-Verse comic viewer application with i18n, theming, and progressive rendering.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes and design tokens for the comic viewer UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title "Spider-Verse Comic Viewer - Into the Spider-Verse" and a root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating providers (Theme, Query, Preferences, Settings), error boundary, and rendering Header, ComicViewer, CharactersGallery, controls, and Footer sections with transcript state management.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a comic-styled recovery UI with reset and reload options instead of a blank screen.
frontend/src/components/CharactersGaller: Grid gallery component displaying character cards with images and names from CHARACTERS data, featuring hover effects and error fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Reusable comic panel container component with border styling, shadow effects, animation, and support for default/highlight/credits variants.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Presentational components for comic elements (CaptionBox, SpeechBubble, ThoughtBubble, SfxText, SceneLabel) with distinct styling and overlay support for in-panel rendering.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Main comic viewer component with progressive rendering, localization, optional deduplication, timeline mode support, missing asset warnings, and chapter-based panel display with load-more controls.
Button component that exports the comic to PDF with localization, author name, and timeline mode support. Handles loading state and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, attribution to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking, and credits for Spider-Man IP. Supports internationalization.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with comic title, subtitle, language selector, and theme toggle button. Uses internationalization for all text content.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown select component for choosing the application language. Displays available languages from i18n configuration.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Toggle switch control for enabling/disabling repetition removal in comic narration. Persists setting via ComicSettingsContext.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Speech recognition control with start/stop buttons and status badges. Forwards transcript updates and errors to parent component.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Text-to-speech narration control with voice selection for different characters (Miles, Jefferson, default). Generates narration script from localized comic panels with optional repetition removal.
Displays speech recognition transcript with word count, copy to clipboard, and clear functionality. Shows both final and interim transcripts.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedPanelIma: Image component with error handling that falls back to a placeholder image on load failure. Reports errors via callback while preserving layout.
frontend/src/contexts/AppPreferencesCont: React context providing global app preferences (language, author name, timeline mode) with localStorage persistence and BCP-47 language tag validation.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: React context managing comic-specific settings, currently only repetition removal toggle for narration.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useI18n.ts: Hook providing internationalization translation function that memoizes based on current language from AppPreferencesContext.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingIllustratio: Hook that tracks and reports missing illustration assets by collecting filenames of failed image loads with a 100-item cap for memory safety.
Hook for progressive rendering of comic panels in batches to prevent performance issues, with configurable initial count and increment size.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for deduplicating comic text lines via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on success.
Hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API for voice input, providing transcript state, interim results, error handling, and browser compatibility detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Hook that loads and tracks available browser text-to-speech voices, handling asynchronous voice loading via the voiceschanged event.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Hook for narrating story scripts using Web Speech API with per-speaker voice selection, playback controls (play/pause/stop), and configurable rate/pitch settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with comic book-themed design system including aged paper textures, halftone overlays, speech bubbles, caption boxes, and bold typography styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/characters.ts: Character definitions for Spider-Verse characters with IDs, names, and artwork asset paths for Miles, Gwen, Peter variants, villains, and supporting cast.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Contains structured comic panel data for Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, organized into chapters with 500+ panels covering the full movie narrative, including sample translations in multiple languages.
frontend/src/lib/comicLocalization.ts: Provides functions to localize comic panels, chapters, and text parts by resolving translations based on language tags with English fallback.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for comic panels (story/credits), panel parts (caption, dialogue, thought, sfx, scene), chapters, and utility functions for text extraction and flattening.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements deduplication utilities to remove repeated text lines and panel parts across panels while preserving structure and order, plus counting functions.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Internationalization module that normalizes language tags, provides translation function with variable substitution, and manages locale dictionaries for six languages (en, es, fr, de, ja, zh).
frontend/src/lib/locales/de.ts: German translation dictionary containing UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, transcript, PDF export, and other interface elements.
frontend/src/lib/locales/en.ts: English translation dictionary (base locale) containing all UI strings for the comic viewer interface including narration, listening, controls, and export features.
frontend/src/lib/locales/es.ts: Spanish translation dictionary containing UI strings for all interface elements including header, narration, listening mode, controls, and footer text.
frontend/src/lib/locales/fr.ts: French translation dictionary exporting `frDict` with UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, PDF export, timeline, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/locales/ja.ts: Japanese translation dictionary exporting `jaDict` with UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, PDF export, timeline, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/locales/zh.ts: Chinese translation dictionary exporting `zhDict` with UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, PDF export, timeline, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Converts comic panels to narration script items with text and optional speaker metadata, applying deduplication when repetition removal is enabled.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Exports comic panels to PDF by generating printable HTML with deduplication, timeline timestamps, chapter grouping, and opening a browser print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/timeline.ts: Provides utilities to format timestamps (HH:MM:SS) and ranges for aligning comic panels to a 1h 56m movie runtime.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function `cn` that merges Tailwind CSS class names using `clsx` and `twMerge`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders `App` wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: TypeScript ambient type definitions for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition and related interfaces).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (OKLCH), fonts (Bangers, Arial), comic-style shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for a Spider-Verse Comic Viewer application tracking a fix request to restore missing comic panels that were removed in a previous version. Contains feature tracking, known issues, and project metadata with schema version 1.0.0.
